<br/><span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H3">The DISTANCE action with label <b>G452_C451_H3</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">RESTRAINT<div class="right">Adds harmonic and/or linear restraints on one or more variables. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_r_e_s_t_r_a_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datA466_T437_H1">A466_T437_H1</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datA466_T437_H2">A466_T437_H2</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H1">G452_C451_H1</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H2">G452_C451_H2</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H3">G452_C451_H3</b> <div class="tooltip">AT<div class="right">the position of the restraint<i></i></div></div>=0.29,0.29,0.29,0.29,0.29  <div class="tooltip">KAPPA<div class="right"> specifies that the restraint is harmonic and what the values of the force constants on each of the variables are<i></i></div></div>=2000.0,2000.0,2000.0,2000.0,2000.0 <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_DNA" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_DNA")'>RESTRAINT_DNA</b>

<br/><span style="color:blue"># RESTRAIN ARGININE HBONDS</span>
<span style="color:blue"># see Genes Dev. 1999 Mar 15; 13(6): 666–674 [Reference paper for pdb: 1cf7]. Figure 4.</span>
<span style="color:blue"># consider common recognition sequence: C442-C445/G458-G462</span>
<br/><span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_DNA">The RESTRAINT action with label <b>RESTRAINT_DNA</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">RESTRAINT_DNA.bias</td><td>the instantaneous value of the bias potential</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">RESTRAINT_DNA.force2</td><td>the instantaneous value of the squared force due to this bias potential</td></tr></table></span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR46_DG458" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR46_DG458")'>R46_DG458</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DISTANCE<div class="right">Calculate the distance between a pair of atoms. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_i_s_t_a_n_c_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">NOPBC<div class="right"> ignore the periodic boundary conditions when calculating distances<i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ATOMS<div class="right">the pair of atom that we are calculating the distance between<i></i></div></div>=<div class="tooltip">@NE-46<div class="right">the NE atom in residue 46. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>,<div class="tooltip">@O6-458<div class="right">the O6 atom in residue 458. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR46_DG458">The DISTANCE action with label <b>R46_DG458</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR47_DG444" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR47_DG444")'>R47_DG444</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DISTANCE<div class="right">Calculate the distance between a pair of atoms. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_i_s_t_a_n_c_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">NOPBC<div class="right"> ignore the periodic boundary conditions when calculating distances<i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ATOMS<div class="right">the pair of atom that we are calculating the distance between<i></i></div></div>=<div class="tooltip">@NH2-47<div class="right">the NH2 atom in residue 47. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>,<div class="tooltip">@O6-444<div class="right">the O6 atom in residue 444. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR47_DG444">The DISTANCE action with label <b>R47_DG444</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR250_DG442" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR250_DG442")'>R250_DG442</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DISTANCE<div class="right">Calculate the distance between a pair of atoms. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_i_s_t_a_n_c_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">NOPBC<div class="right"> ignore the periodic boundary conditions when calculating distances<i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ATOMS<div class="right">the pair of atom that we are calculating the distance between<i></i></div></div>=<div class="tooltip">@NE-250<div class="right">the NE atom in residue 250. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>,<div class="tooltip">@O6-442<div class="right">the O6 atom in residue 442. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR250_DG442">The DISTANCE action with label <b>R250_DG442</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR251_DG460" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR251_DG460")'>R251_DG460</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DISTANCE<div class="right">Calculate the distance between a pair of atoms. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_i_s_t_a_n_c_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">NOPBC<div class="right"> ignore the periodic boundary conditions when calculating distances<i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ATOMS<div class="right">the pair of atom that we are calculating the distance between<i></i></div></div>=<div class="tooltip">@NH2-251<div class="right">the NH2 atom in residue 251. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>,<div class="tooltip">@O6-460<div class="right">the O6 atom in residue 460. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_m_o_l_i_n_f_o.html">Click here</a> for more information. <i></i></div></div>
<br/><span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR251_DG460">The DISTANCE action with label <b>R251_DG460</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">RESTRAINT<div class="right">Adds harmonic and/or linear restraints on one or more variables. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_r_e_s_t_r_a_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR46_DG458">R46_DG458</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR47_DG444">R47_DG444</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR250_DG442">R250_DG442</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR251_DG460">R251_DG460</b> <div class="tooltip">AT<div class="right">the position of the restraint<i></i></div></div>=0.29,0.29,0.29,0.29  <div class="tooltip">KAPPA<div class="right"> specifies that the restraint is harmonic and what the values of the force constants on each of the variables are<i></i></div></div>=2000.0,2000.0,2000.0,2000.0 <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_ARG" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_ARG")'>RESTRAINT_ARG</b>


<br/><span style="color:blue"># PRINT</span>
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_ARG">The RESTRAINT action with label <b>RESTRAINT_ARG</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">RESTRAINT_ARG.bias</td><td>the instantaneous value of the bias potential</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">RESTRAINT_ARG.force2</td><td>the instantaneous value of the squared force due to this bias potential</td></tr></table></span><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">PRINT<div class="right">Print quantities to a file. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_p_r_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_DNA">RESTRAINT_DNA.bias</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datRESTRAINT_ARG">RESTRAINT_ARG.bias</b> <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the quantities of interest should be output<i></i></div></div>=2000 <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right">the name of the file on which to output these quantities<i></i></div></div>=RESTRAINTS
<div class="tooltip" style="color:green">PRINT<div class="right">Print quantities to a file. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_p_r_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datA466_T437_H1">A466_T437_H1</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datA466_T437_H2">A466_T437_H2</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H1">G452_C451_H1</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H2">G452_C451_H2</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datG452_C451_H3">G452_C451_H3</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR46_DG458">R46_DG458</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR47_DG444">R47_DG444</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR250_DG442">R250_DG442</b>,<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datR251_DG460">R251_DG460</b> <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the quantities of interest should be output<i></i></div></div>=2000 <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right">the name of the file on which to output these quantities<i></i></div></div>=HBONDS

<br/><span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datsaxsCG">The SAXS action with label <b>saxsCG</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.score</td><td>the Metainference score</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.sigma</td><td>uncertainty parameter</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.sigmaMean</td><td>uncertainty in the mean estimate</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.neff</td><td>effective number of replicas</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.acceptSigma</td><td>MC acceptance for sigma values</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.acceptScale</td><td>MC acceptance for scale value</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.scale</td><td>scale parameter</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsCG.q</td><td>The # SAXS of q</td></tr></table></span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datsaxsbias" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datsaxsbias")'>saxsbias</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">BIASVALUE<div class="right">Takes the value of one variable and use it as a bias <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_b_i_a_s_v_a_l_u_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=(saxsCG\.score <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right">the frequency with which the forces due to the bias should be calculated<i></i></div></div>=6
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datsaxsbias">The BIASVALUE action with label <b>saxsbias</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsbias.bias</td><td>the instantaneous value of the bias potential</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">saxsbias._bias</td><td>one or multiple instances of this quantity can be referenced elsewhere in the input file</td></tr></table></span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datens" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datens")'>ens</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">ENSEMBLE<div class="right">Calculates the replica averaging of a collective variable over multiple replicas. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_e_n_s_e_m_b_l_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=(saxsCG\.q
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datens">The ENSEMBLE action with label <b>ens</b> calculates a scalar quantity</span><b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datstatCG" onclick='showPath("data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.dat","data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datstatCG")'>statCG</b>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">STATS<div class="right">Calculates statistical properties of a set of collective variables with respect to a set of reference values. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_s_t_a_t_s.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=(ens\.saxsCG\.q <div class="tooltip">PARARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions without derivatives<i></i></div></div>=(saxsCG\.exp
<br/><span style="color:blue"># PRINT</span>
<span style="display:none;" id="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datstatCG">The STATS action with label <b>statCG</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">statCG.sqdevsum</td><td>the sum of the squared deviations between arguments and parameters</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">statCG.corr</td><td>the correlation between arguments and parameters</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">statCG.slope</td><td>the slope of a linear fit between arguments and parameters</td></tr><tr><td width="5%">statCG.intercept</td><td>the intercept of a linear fit between arguments and parameters</td></tr></table></span><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">PRINT<div class="right">Print quantities to a file. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_p_r_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=(saxsCG\.score),(saxsCG\.scale),(saxsCG\.acceptScale),(saxsCG\.acceptSigma),(saxsCG\.sigma <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the quantities of interest should be output<i></i></div></div>=500 <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right">the name of the file on which to output these quantities<i></i></div></div>=BAYES.SAXS
<div class="tooltip" style="color:green">PRINT<div class="right">Print quantities to a file. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_p_r_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=(saxsCG\.q <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right">the name of the file on which to output these quantities<i></i></div></div>=SAXSINTCG <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the quantities of interest should be output<i></i></div></div>=2500
<div class="tooltip" style="color:green">PRINT<div class="right">Print quantities to a file. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_p_r_i_n_t.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/E2F1-DP1_PLUMED-NEST/MULTI_REPLICA/plumed-main.datstatCG">statCG.*</b>,(ens\.saxsCG\.q <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right">the name of the file on which to output these quantities<i></i></div></div>=ST.SAXSCG <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the quantities of interest should be output<i></i></div></div>=2500
